_comment: T8 (audit 2026-07-09): the ONE imagery ASK — shared by the Solo/Studio mid-turn gate (main.cjs) and the pre-/flow gate (App.jsx) so every build path asks the same question with the same options.
question: Imagery for this site — what should carry the visuals?

options.label: Real photography
options.desc: Licensed stock photos, vision-checked on-topic — hero + key sections.

options.label: CSS/SVG illustrations - no stock photos
options.desc: Deliberate drawn visuals, diagrams, gradients — nothing from photo stocks.

options.label: Typography-led - minimal imagery
options.desc: Layout, type and color carry the design; no photos.

genOption.label: AI-generated imagery
genOption.desc: Bespoke images generated for you by your connected AI — costs per image.
